name: Old-Fashioned Lemon Chess Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the entire peel from the two lemons and squeeze all the juice; set aside.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar. Add the eggs and beat well.
3. Mix in the lemon juice and rind until smooth.
4. Divide the mixture between the two unbaked pie crusts.
5. Bake at 425°F until the edges of the filling begin to brown (watch carefully!).
6. Reduce the oven temperature to 300°F.
7. When the top of the pie begins to brown, turn off the oven and open the oven door.
8. Leave the pie in the oven until it is cool.
Makes 2 9-inch pies.
